memo: 你 = person (亻) + you · 好 = woman (女) + child (子) = GOOD. A woman with a child says hello!
谢 = speech (讠) + body (身) + inch (寸). You speak and bow your body an inch — that's THANKS.
再 = one more time · 见 = to see. 'See you again' = goodbye.
对 = correct · 不 = not · 起 = rise. 'Can't rise to what's correct' = sorry.
请 = speech (讠) + blue/green (青). Polite speech is PLEASE.
是 = sun (日) on top + correct (正) below. What the sun reveals IS true.
不 looks like a bird that can NOT fly — wings spread but stuck to a line.
好 = woman (女) + child (子). A mother with child = GOOD.
我 has a hand (扌) holding a weapon (戈). I defend MYSELF.
你 = person (亻) + small (小) with a roof. The person standing next to me is YOU.
他 = person (亻) + also (也). The OTHER person = HE. Person radical = male.
她 = woman (女) + also (也). Same as 他 but with WOMAN radical = SHE.
们 = person (亻) + gate (门). People coming through the gate = PLURAL.
这 = the walking radical (辶) carrying something. Walking toward THIS thing right here.
那 has an ear radical (阝) on the right. Point your ear at THAT thing over there.
什 = person (亻) + ten (十). A person with ten questions asks WHAT? 么 = tiny, the small question word.
哪 = mouth (口) asking + 那 (that). Your mouth asks 'which that?' = WHERE. 里 = inside/mile.
多 = two moons (夕夕) = MANY. 少 = small with a slash = FEW. 'Many or few?' = HOW MUCH?
怎 = suddenly (乍) + heart (心). Your heart suddenly wonders HOW?
为 = for/because + 什么 (what) = 'for what?' = WHY?
一 = ONE horizontal line. Simplest character.
二 = TWO horizontal lines.
三 = THREE horizontal lines. See the pattern!
四 looks like a window with FOUR panes.
五 looks like a hand with FIVE fingers spread between two bars.
六 has a roof (亠) with two legs — SIX looks like a person sitting cross-legged.
七 looks like an upside-down 7 — SEVEN with a crossed leg.
八 = two strokes splitting apart, like breaking EIGHT in half.
九 looks like a bent arm flexing — the NINE muscles.
十 = a cross, like TEN on a clock face. Also looks like + (plus).
百 = one (一) on top of white (白). One hundred white things.
千 = ten (十) with an extra stroke. Ten hundreds = THOUSAND.
零 = rain (雨) on top + a command below. Rain falls to ZERO on the ground.
左 = a hand (ナ) + work (工). The LEFT hand does the work.
右 = a hand (ナ) + mouth (口). The RIGHT hand feeds the mouth.
前 has legs at the bottom walking FORWARD, with a moon (月) as the path ahead.
后 = a person dragging one foot, falling BEHIND.
上 = a line pointing UP above a base. The dot is above.
下 = a line pointing DOWN below a base. The dot is below. Opposite of 上.
里 = field (田) + earth (土). INSIDE the field, in the earth.
外 = evening (夕) + divination (卜). Fortune-telling OUTSIDE at night.
水 looks like a river with splashing WATER — the middle stroke is the current, sides are splashes.
茶 = grass/plant (艹) + person (人) + tree (木). A person picking TEA leaves from a plant-tree.
米 looks like a rice plant with grains scattering. 饭 = eat (饣) + rice. RICE to eat!
面 = a face/surface (flat like noodles). 条 = strips. Flat strips = NOODLES.
啤 = mouth (口) + beer sound. 酒 = water (氵) + a wine jar (酉). Liquid from a jar = BEER.
Both characters have mouth (口) — COFFEE is a sound borrowed word (ka-fei), mouths making sounds.
菜 = grass/plant (艹) + harvest (采). Harvesting plants = VEGETABLES/DISH.
肉 looks like ribs hanging — two inner strokes are pieces of MEAT.
鸡 = hand/claw (又) + bird (鸟). A bird you grab = CHICKEN.
鱼 looks like a FISH — head on top, scales in middle (田), tail at bottom.
好 (good) + 吃 (eat) = good to eat = DELICIOUS. 吃 = mouth (口) + beg (乞).
菜 (dish) + 单 (single/list) = a list of dishes = MENU.
买 (buy) + 单 (list) = buy the list = pay the BILL.
出 (out) + 租 (rent) + 车 (vehicle) = a rented-out vehicle = TAXI.
地 (ground/earth) + 铁 (iron) = iron underground = SUBWAY.
飞 (fly) + 机 (machine) = flying machine = AIRPLANE.
火 (fire) + 车 (vehicle) = fire vehicle = TRAIN (steam trains!).
机 (machine/airplane) + 场 (field) = airplane field = AIRPORT.
酒 (alcohol/wine) + 店 (shop) = wine shop = HOTEL (old inns served wine).
票 = west (覀) + show (示). Show your pass at the western gate = TICKET.
站 = stand (立) + occupy (占). A place where you STAND and wait = STATION.
钱 = gold/metal (钅) + two spears (戋). Metal weapons were the first MONEY.
太 (too) + 贵 (expensive) + 了 (emphasis). 贵 has shell/money (贝) — old currency. TOO EXPENSIVE!
便 = person (亻) + change (更). 宜 = suitable. A person changes the price to suitable = CHEAP.
大 = a person stretching arms wide. BIG person, arms out!
小 = a vertical line being split into tiny pieces. SMALL.
医 = arrows (矢) in a box — removing arrows from wounds = MEDICINE. 院 = courtyard. Medical courtyard = HOSPITAL.
帮 = a state/country helping. 忙 = heart (忄) + die/perish (亡). Heart about to perish needs HELP!
洗 (wash) + 手 (hand) + 间 (room) = hand-washing room = RESTROOM. Literally!
电 (electric) + 话 (speech/words) = electric speech = PHONE.
药 = grass/plant (艹) + music (乐). Plants that make you feel musical = MEDICINE.
今 = a roof covering NOW. 天 = sky/day (big person 大 under the sky 一). Under the roof of NOW + this DAY = TODAY.
明 = sun (日) + moon (月). When you see the sun AND moon = TOMORROW (the next full cycle).
昨 = sun (日) + made/did (乍). The sun that already happened = YESTERDAY.
现 = king (王) + see (见). The king sees what is happening NOW. 在 = at/existing.
时 = sun (日) + inch (寸). An inch of sunlight = a MOMENT in TIME.
早 = sun (日) on top of ten (十). The sun at the top of its first ten degrees = MORNING. 上 = on/up.
晚 = sun (日) + exempt/free (免). When the sun is freed from duty = EVENING. 上 = on/up.
要 = west (覀) + woman (女). A woman heading west WANTS something on her journey.
有 = hand (ナ) + moon (月). If you can reach out and grab the moon, you HAVE it.
去 = earth (土) + a step away. Stepping away from the earth = GO.
来 = a tree (木) with fruit hanging. Fruit COMES to the tree = COME.
吃 = mouth (口) + beg (乞). Your mouth begs for food = EAT.
喝 = mouth (口) + why/how (曷). Your mouth asks how to quench thirst = DRINK.
看 = hand (手) shading eyes (目). Hand over eyes to LOOK/SEE.
说 = speech (讠) + exchange (兑). Exchanging speech = SPEAK/SAY.
听 = mouth (口) + weight (斤). Weighing the words from someone's mouth = LISTEN.
知 = arrow (矢) + mouth (口). Words that hit like arrows = you KNOW. 道 = path/way.
可 = a nail in a mouth — "it CAN be done!" 以 = because/with. Together = CAN/MAY.
会 = a roof (亠) + cloud (云). Ideas gathering under a roof like clouds = able to/WILL.
想 = mutual (相) + heart (心). What your heart reaches toward = WANT/THINK.
走 = earth (土) + running legs at the bottom. Running across the earth = WALK/GO.
住 = person (亻) + master (主). A person who is master of a place LIVES/STAYS there.
买 = head/top (头) simplified + legs. Running around with stuff on your head = BUY.
给 = thread (纟) + join (合). Threading things together to GIVE them.
很 = step (彳) + stubborn (艮). Stubbornly stepping forward = VERY.
也 = a scorpion shape — where there's one, there's ALSO another.
都 = a city/all (者) + city radical (阝). In a city, ALL people gather.
不 (not) + 客气 (polite air). "Don't be polite!" = YOU'RE WELCOME.
请 (please) + 问 (ask). Please + ask = EXCUSE ME (when asking a question).
没 (not have) + 关系 (relationship). "No relationship to worry about" = IT DOESN'T MATTER.
在 = earth (土) + exist (才). Existing on the earth = AT/IN. Also marks ongoing action.
的 = white (白) + spoon (勺). The white spoon BELONGS TO someone = possessive particle.
了 = a hook that catches the action and marks it COMPLETED.
吗 = mouth (口) + horse (马). A mouth making a horse sound at the end = QUESTION marker.
人 looks like a walking PERSON — two legs in stride.
中 = center/middle (an arrow through the center). 国 = territory (a jade 玉 inside borders 囗). Center territory = CHINA.
美 = big (大) + sheep (羊). A big beautiful sheep = BEAUTIFUL. 国 = country. Beautiful country = AMERICA.
朋 = two moons (月月) side by side. 友 = two hands reaching. Two people reaching for each other under moonlight = FRIEND.
不好意思 = not + good + meaning + think. "My meaning is not good" = EXCUSE ME / I'M EMBARRASSED.
我 (I) + 不 (not) + 懂 (understand). 懂 = heart (忄) + meaning. My heart doesn't grasp the meaning = I DON'T UNDERSTAND.

pinyin: wǒ bú huì shuō zhōng wén
memo: 我 (I) + 不会 (cannot) + 说 (speak) + 中文 (Chinese). I cannot speak Chinese — your survival phrase!

pinyin: nǐ huì shuō yīng yǔ ma
memo: 你 (you) + 会 (can) + 说 (speak) + 英语 (English) + 吗 (?)  = DO YOU SPEAK ENGLISH?
多少 (how much) + 钱 (money) = HOW MUCH MONEY? The most important shopping phrase.
太 (too/very) + 好 (good) + 了 (emphasis) = TOO GOOD = GREAT/AWESOME!
没 (not) + 有 (have) = DON'T HAVE / THERE ISN'T. Opposite of 有.
厕 = a shelter (厂) for measured (则) activities. 所 = place. A sheltered place = TOILET.
打 (hit/strike) + 车 (vehicle). Strike/summon a vehicle = HAIL A TAXI.
我 (I) + 要 (want) + 去 (go) = I WANT TO GO TO. Combine with any destination!
热 = hand (扌) + circle (丸) + fire (灬) at the bottom. Holding something over fire = HOT.
冷 = ice (冫) + command (令). Ice commands the temperature = COLD.
快 = heart (忄) + decisive (夬). A decisive heart moves FAST.
慢 = heart (忄) + graceful (曼). A graceful heart moves SLOW.
远 = walk (辶) + origin (元). Walking back to the origin is FAR.
近 = walk (辶) + axe (斤). Only a short walk with an axe = NEAR.
开 looks like two hands pulling a gate OPEN.
关 = two bars closing a gate. CLOSE/shut.
等 = bamboo (⺮) + temple (寺). Waiting at a bamboo temple = WAIT.
找 = hand (扌) + spear (戈). Hand reaching for a spear = LOOK FOR / FIND.
换 = hand (扌) + big (奂). Hand swapping something big = CHANGE/EXCHANGE. Useful for money exchange!
路 = foot (足) + each (各). Each foot on the path = ROAD.
东 = the sun (日) rising behind a tree (木) = EAST, where the sun rises.
西 = a bird nesting as the sun sets = WEST. (Also means "thing" in 东西.)
东 (east) + 西 (west) = from east to west = everything = THING/STUFF.
北 (north) + 京 (capital) = Northern Capital = BEIJING.
上 (above/on) + 海 (sea) = On the Sea = SHANGHAI.
手 (hand) + 机 (machine) = hand machine = CELL PHONE.
密 (secret) + 码 (code) = secret code = PASSWORD. Essential for travel!
护 (protect) + 照 (shine/photo) = protective document with photo = PASSPORT.
签 (sign) + 证 (certificate) = signed certificate = VISA.
行 (travel) + 李 (plums/belongings) = travel belongings = LUGGAGE.
房 (house) + 间 (between/space) = a space in a house = ROOM.
吃 (eat) + 饭 (rice/meal). Eating rice = having a MEAL. The universal Chinese invite!
服务 (service) + 员 (person) = service person = WAITER. Shout this to get attention in restaurants!
不 (not) + 要 (want) = DON'T WANT. Essential for refusing hawkers!
可 (able) + 以 (by means of) = CAN / OK. The universal permission word.
没 (not have) + 问题 (question/problem) = NO PROBLEM. You'll hear this constantly.
危 (perilous) + 险 (steep/risky) = DANGEROUS. Important safety word.
小 (small) + 心 (heart) = make your heart small/cautious = BE CAREFUL.
